_provenance: Agent-loop wall-clock split into LLM-inference time vs local tool-execution time. tool_s sources: SWE-bench = summed trajectory step execution_time; BigCodeBench = summed per-task exec_times; OpenClaw = container_timeline active-cycle seconds (cycles > 5% of one core). inference_s = wall_s - tool_s. calendar's timeline was overwritten by a later run, so its numbers are from the original 2026-06-26 run.
metric: tool_pct = local CPU tool-execution share of wall-clock; inference_pct = 100 - tool_pct (time the agent waits on LLM generation, i.e. inference-GPU time)
